# Build to Understand

> Build to Understand is Alex Shlykov's personal project — a collection of interactive browser games designed to teach complex ideas through play. Some games help you understand concepts from philosophy, history, and neuroscience; others create immersive emotional experiences.

## Games to Learn From

- [The Choice](https://thechoice.quest/): An interactive journey through the foundations of moral philosophy
- [The Evolution of Civilizations](https://buildtounderstand.dev/theworld/): Trace the forces that shaped the rise and fall of civilizations
- [How the Brain Shapes Behavior](https://buildtounderstand.dev/thebrain/): Discover which brain systems drive your everyday decisions

## Games to Feel

- [The Village](https://buildtounderstand.dev/thevillage/): Remember that childhood feeling when the dark forest is already watching, and you run home at the very last moment

## Links

- [Main site](https://buildtounderstand.dev/)
- [Substack newsletter](https://buildtounderstand.substack.com/)
